message:
feat(gateway): Add analytics query caching layer

Implement QueryCache service with TTL-based expiration, LRU eviction,
and cache hit/miss metrics. Integrated with agent-analytics.service.ts
for productivity, quality, duration, and efficiency metrics.

Features:
- 30-second TTL for analytics queries
- LRU eviction at 500 entries
- Automatic invalidation on history table updates
- Metrics integration for hit/miss tracking
- Structured logging with correlation IDs

Closes flywheel_gateway-0cg

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
